title: The Curse of Blackwood Manor
history: Blackwood Manor was once the seat of a noble family known for their benevolence. Fifty years ago, during the Night of the Red Moon, the entire family vanished. Since then, a creeping fog has surrounded the estate, and villagers who venture too close return with stories of weeping statues and shadows that move on their own.
atmosphere: Oppressive, foggy, silent except for the creaking of old wood and distant, unexplained whispers. The air smells of damp earth and decay.
setup: The party has been hired by the last living heir, Julianne Blackwood, to reclaim the deed to the manor from the family vault so she can sell the cursed land. They begin at the rusted iron gates of the estate.

startingPointImage.description: Rusted iron gates entwined with thorny vines, standing before a fog-shrouded path.
startingPointImage.prompt: Gothic iron gates, rusted, misty forest background, dark fantasy style, digital painting, gloomy lighting

mapImagePrompt.description: A top-down map of a three-story victorian manor and surrounding overgrown gardens.
mapImagePrompt.prompt: Dungeons and Dragons battle map, victorian mansion floor plan, overgrown garden, grid overlay, parchment texture

plotHooks.title: The Heir's Request
plotHooks.description: Julianne Blackwood offers 500 gold pieces for the retrieval of the deed, but she refuses to step foot on the property herself.

plotHooks.title: The Missing Children
plotHooks.description: Village locals mention that two children went playing near the manor yesterday and haven't returned.

mainPlotSteps.title: Breaching the Gates
mainPlotSteps.description: The party must navigate the trapped garden maze to reach the front door.

mainPlotSteps.title: The Foyer Ghost
mainPlotSteps.description: Upon entering, they encounter the spirit of the butler who demands a password or a duel.

mainPlotSteps.title: The Crypt
mainPlotSteps.description: The deed is located in the crypts beneath the house, guarded by the reanimated ancestors.

mainCharacters.name: Julianne Blackwood

image.description: A nervous young woman in traveling clothes clutching a locket.
image.prompt: Portrait of a worried noblewoman, blonde hair, travel gear, holding a locket, realistic style

mainCharacters.goal: Sell the manor to pay off her debts.
mainCharacters.description: The last surviving member of the Blackwood line, desperate to sever ties with her family's dark past.

monsters.name: Spectral Guardian

image.description: A translucent figure in rusted armor floating above the ground.
image.prompt: Ghostly knight, translucent blue, rusted armor, glowing eyes, dark dungeon background

monsters.description: The restless spirit of a house guard, bound to protect the manor even in death.

rewardsImagePrompt.description: An open chest filled with gold coins and a glowing blue gem.
rewardsImagePrompt.prompt: Treasure chest, open, gold coins, glowing blue sapphire, dark wood floor, dramatic lighting

rewardsList.name: Family Signet Ring
rewardsList.description: A gold ring bearing the Blackwood crest. Worth 100gp.

image.description: A heavy gold ring with a crest.
image.prompt: Gold signet ring, macro shot, intricate crest design

generatedMagicItems.name: Lantern of Revealing

image.description: A brass lantern that burns with a white flame.
image.prompt: Brass oil lantern, white magical flame, darkness surrounding

generatedMagicItems.description: While lit, this lantern sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and reveals invisible creatures and objects.

generatedPlotTwists.title: The Heir is Possessed
generatedPlotTwists.description: Julianne is actually possessed by the spirit of the ancestor who cursed the manor originally; she wants the deed to legally bind the land to the demon lord she serves.

playerCharacters.name: Garret Ironheart

image.description: A human fighter in chainmail holding a shield and sword.
image.prompt: Human male fighter, chainmail armor, shield, longsword, heroic pose, fantasy art

playerCharacters.description: A former city guard looking for adventure and coin to send back to his family.
playerCharacters.ideals: Greater Good. Our lot is to lay down our lives in defense of others.
playerCharacters.bonds: I fight for those who cannot fight for themselves.
playerCharacters.flaws: I have little respect for anyone who is not a proven warrior.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.description: Ability to climb, jump, and swim.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.description: Ability to influence others through threat.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: You can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment.
